blurb: Zone-3-hardy tart cherry, self-fertile and sweet enough to eat fresh or bake into pie.
spread: Clumping — self-fertile (one tree fruits); may sucker
seasons: White blossom spring; dark-red tart cherries July
wildlife: Bee-pollinated; birds eagerly take the fruit
toxic: Fruit flesh edible (tart); pits, leaves & twigs cyanogenic — toxic to people/pets/livestock
